title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at FedEx India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at FedEx India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FedEx India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About FedEx India:
FedEx India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FedEx India!
